chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI 1st Appeal No. 12 of 2023 _____________________________________________________ Date Order.with signature of Judge Hearing 1.For order on CMA No.5337/23 (withdrawal) 2.For order on office objection/reply A 3.For hearing of main case 4.For hearing of CMA No.629/23 (stay) 27.11.2023 Mr. Muhammad Ghaffar Khan Kakar, Advocate for Appellant......... This is an application (CMA No.5337/23) for unconditional withdrawal of appeal. It is claimed that the parties have reached to an amicable out of Court’s settlement. Application is supported by affidavit of Atir Ikram/appellant. Application is allowed to the extent of withdrawal of appeal unconditionally along with all pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
